title: Clean Rain - Heycronus
description: This texture makes the rain and snow in Minecraft clearer
body:
![C Rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7745a33c5af35795e161785997165caab71d6c.png)

Bring a cleaner and smoother rainy atmosphere to your Minecraft world with Clean Rain.

This texture pack improves the rain visuals by making it less intrusive and much more pleasant to look at.
Besides reducing the opacity, it also decreases the amount of rain pixels, creating a softer effect that keeps the rainy mood without blocking your view.

Perfect for players who enjoy rain ambiance but want a cleaner screen, better visibility, and a more aesthetic experience.

✨ Features
🌫️ Lower rain opacity
💧 Reduced rain pixel density
👀 Better visibility during storms
🎮 Vanilla-friendly style
⚡ Lightweight and simple
